article_title: Liquor Primary licences for outdoor event venues

briefs.title: Outdoor event venues can now apply for a permanent liquor licence instead of repeated event permits
briefs.summary: BC's Liquor and Cannabis Regulation Branch now allows outdoor event venues — like music festivals and large concert grounds — to apply for a permanent Liquor Primary (LP) licence. Previously, these venues had to apply for a separate Special Event Permit (a one-time approval to serve liquor at a specific event) each time they hosted an event.
briefs.action_required: Apply for a permanent LP licence via the BC liquor and cannabis licensing portal — no deadline applies.
briefs.article_title: Liquor Primary licences for outdoor event venues
